category_sources: Official repository README describes a TOTP CLI tool for 2FA tokens.
source_facts.description says totp-cli is an Authy/Google Authenticator-like TOTP CLI tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository README help output names the command totp-cli.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation and usage documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official project documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/yitsushi/totp-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README install command uses the Go module path.
Official repository README topics include cli, totp, otp-generator, and totp-cli.
source_facts.description identifies TOTP and Authenticator-like functionality.
